# Operations

Agents for incident response, SOP writing, and project status reporting.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Dashboard Briefing Agent](./dashboard-briefing-agent/): Converts live dashboards and KPI snapshots into short operational briefings.
  Best for: status reporting, incident response. Tags: `operations`, `execution`, `dashboard`, `briefing`.
- [Incident Commander](./incident-commander/): Coordinates response during outages and incidents.
  Best for: status reporting, incident response. Tags: `operations`, `execution`, `incident`.
- [Project State Manager](./project-state-manager/): Consolidates scattered project updates into a current state map and next actions.
  Best for: status reporting, incident response. Tags: `operations`, `execution`, `project`, `state`.
- [Project Status Reporter](./project-status-reporter/): Creates short, honest stakeholder status updates.
  Best for: status reporting, incident response. Tags: `operations`, `execution`, `project`, `status`.
- [Sop Writer](./sop-writer/): Converts repeated work into clear SOPs.
  Best for: status reporting, incident response. Tags: `operations`, `execution`, `sop`.
